mapper.sql:
SELECT A.ASMT_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , ( SELECT SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID ) AS SBJCTNM , A.ASMT_CTGRCD , ( SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ASMT_CTGRCD' AND CD = A.ASMT_CTGRCD AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ASMNT_CTGR_NM , A.ASMT_TTL , A.ASMT_CTS , A.SEND_START_DTTM , A.SEND_END_DTTM , A.PRTC_YN , A.SEND_TYPE , A.SBMT_FILE_TYPE , A.ASMNT_OPEN_YN , A.EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN , A.EXT_SEND_DTTM , A.TEAM_ASMNT_CFG_YN , A.TEAM_TYCD , A.TEAM_EVAL_YN , A.MEMBER_SUBMIT_YN , A.EVAL_USE_YN , A.EVL_SDTTM , A.EVL_EDTTM , A.EVL_CTGRCD , A.EVL_RSLT_OYN , A.EVL_CRTR_USEYN , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.MRK_RFLTRT , NVL(A.MRK_OYN, 'N') AS MRK_OYN , A.VIEW_SCORE_DTTM , A.AVG_OPEN_YN , A.DVCLAS_REGYN , A.PUSH_NOTIYN , A.SBMT_OPEN_YN , A.SBMT_START_DTTM , A.SBMT_END_DTTM , A.RESEND_START_DTTM , A.RESEND_END_DTTM , A.IND_YN , A.DELYN , A.REG_YN , A.RGTR_ID , ( SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , ( SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.MDFR_ID) AS MOD_NM , A.MOD_DTTM , ( SELECT COUNT(T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN T WHERE T.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND T.DELYN = 'N' ) AS TARGET_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN T WHERE T.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND T.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT','RE','LATE') AND T.DELYN = 'N' ) AS SUBMIT_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN T WHERE T.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND T.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' AND T.DELYN = 'N' ) AS NO_CNT , B.SBMSN_STSCD , B.EVLYN , B.SCR , ( SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ASMNT_SUBMIT_CD' AND CD = NVL(B.SBMSN_STSCD, 'NO') AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ASMNT_SUBMIT_STATUS_NM , B.STD_ID , ( SELECT COUNT(ASMT_FDBK_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMNT_FDBK WHERE ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) AS FDBK_CNT , NVL((SELECT TKEXAM_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N'), '') AS TKEXAM_TYCD , CASE WHEN A.ASMT_CTGRCD = 'SUBS' THEN NVL((SELECT REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND EXAM_ID = NVL((SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N'), '')), 'N') ELSE 'Y' END AS TARGET_YN , ( SELECT T.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID FROM TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN T WHERE T.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND T.LINK_CD = A.ASMT_ID) AS ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.SEND_START_DTTM AND A.SEND_END_DTTM THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SEND_PERIOD_YN , CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.SEND_START_DTTM AND A.EXT_SEND_DTTM THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EXT_PERIOD_YN , CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.RESEND_START_DTTM AND A.RESEND_END_DTTM THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RESEND_PERIOD_YN , B.RESEND_YN FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ASMT_ID , SBMSN_STSCD , STD_ID , EVLYN , SCR , RESEND_YN FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) ) B ON B.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ASMNT_OPEN_YN = 'Y' AND A.SEND_START_DTTM <= FN_DTTM() AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
AND ( LOWER(A.ASMT_CTGRCD) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(A.ASMT_TTL) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmntStuDAO.selectList 설 명 : 등록된 과제 정보 목록 조회 */ SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY SEND_START_DTTM, RT.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT WHERE RT.TARGET_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SEND_START_DTTM DESC, RT.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

/* SQL ID : AsmntStuDAO.selectListPaging 설 명 : 페이징 */ SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY SEND_START_DTTM, RT.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT ORDER BY SEND_START_DTTM DESC, RT.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{listScale}
